title: AMD reaches 46% of server x86 CPU revenue Intel still controls 70% of the consumer PC market share
summary: AMD has reached 46.2% of the x86 server CPU market share, surpassing 38.1% total x86 CPU revenue share. This significant growth is a notable achievement for AMD in the competitive processor market. Intel still maintains a strong presence in the consumer PC market.
insight: AMD's server CPU market share surge indicates long-term industry shift.

title: $499 case turns your PC into a liquid cooling masterpiece for your wall Portal Advanced comes with an integrated distribution plate and reservoir to start of your build
summary: The Portal Advanced is a wall-mounted display case with liquid-cooling support, starting at $499. It features an integrated distribution plate and reservoir to facilitate a seamless build experience. This case is designed for users who want to showcase their PC builds.
insight: Enhanced liquid cooling in a stylish, wall-mounted display case design

title: Bitcoin trader recovers $400,000 using Claude AI after losing wallet password 11 years ago bot tried 3.5 trillion passwords before decrypting an old wallet backup
summary: A Bitcoin trader recovered $400,000 using Claude AI after losing their wallet password 11 years ago. The AI bot successfully decrypted an old wallet backup after trying 3.5 trillion passwords. The trader's luck and AI assistance led to the recovery.
insight: AI-powered password recovery can salvage lost cryptocurrency fortunes.

title: Louis Rossmann taunts Bambu Lab by hosting banned 3D Printer firmware fork, dares $1 billion company to sue him more creators pledge support and boycotts, Snapmaker donates equipment to embattled developer
summary: Louis Rossmann hosts Bambu Lab's banned 3D printer firmware fork on his GitHub, daring legal action.
insight: 3D printing community defies corporate control through open-source firmware forks.

title: 49,000 Lake Tahoe residents could be left powerless as AI data centers inhale electricity supply power company looking to redirect power to 12 data centers, high demand plus a regulatory limbo equals a dim situation
summary: 49,000 Lake Tahoe residents may lose power due to NV Energy redirecting electricity to 12 AI data centers. High demand and regulatory uncertainty contribute to the potential power outage. This situation is expected to worsen by May 2027.
insight: Electricity supply insecurity threatens local residents due to data center demand

title: Klipsch Pro Media Lumina Review: Slimmer subwoofer, even slimmer bass
summary: Klipsch's ProMedia Lumina features customizable LED backlighting and a redesigned subwoofer for enhanced performance.
insight: Slimmer subwoofer design maintains robust low-frequency sound quality reliably.

title: Asus Prime Z890-P Wifi Motherboard Review: Primed and ready for your Core Ultra processor
summary: The Asus Prime Z890-P Wifi is a solid, all-around budget-class board for Z890 and the latest Core Ultra chips. However, other boards around its price offer compelling features and better value.

title: Japanese chemical giant JSR expands to Taiwan for EUV photoresist production near TSMC plant to fill missing chemical link to scale EUV materials
summary: JSR is establishing a plant in Taiwan to produce EUV photoresist, co-developing with TSMC. The plant, set to come online in 2028, aims to fill a critical gap in EUV materials. This expansion will support advanced semiconductor manufacturing.
insight: Critical EUV material link secured for TSMC chip production

title: Microsoft BitLocker-protected drives can now be opened with just some files on a USB stick YellowKey zero-day exploit demonstrates an apparent backdoor
summary: Microsoft BitLocker-protected drives can be opened with files on a USB stick, potentially compromising security.
insight: Potential backdoor in Microsoft BitLocker raises security concerns for encrypted data.

title: AMD expands its Ryzen 9000 PRO lineup with six new SKUs, now featuring 3D V-Cache for the first time new workstation CPUs have up to 170W TDPs, available with OEMs later this year
summary: AMD expands its Ryzen 9000 PRO series with six new SKUs, featuring 3D V-Cache and higher TDPs up to 170W, available with OEMs in Q3 2026.
insight: AMD offers workstation CPUs with higher performance and power efficiency options

title: Microsoft launches Cloud Initiated Driver Recovery for remote rollback of faulty updates no user action or OEM intervention will be needed to handle broken drivers delivered via Windows Update
summary: Microsoft introduces Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery to minimize buggy driver issues, enabling remote rollback of faulty updates without user intervention. This reliability change aims to improve Windows stability and reduce downtime. Automatic recovery will be triggered by Windows Update.
insight: Automated driver recovery reduces downtime and minimizes user inconvenience.

title: Samsung's critical union negotiations break down eight days before planned 18-day chip factory strike that's projected to cost $700 million per day Korean PM calls emergency meeting as strike looms
summary: Samsung's union negotiations have broken down, leading to an impending 18-day strike. The strike is projected to cost $700 million per day. In response, the South Korean Prime Minister has called an emergency meeting.
insight: Global chip supply chain threatened by massive labor dispute escalation

title: Google reportedly in talks with SpaceX to launch its orbital data centers partnership could mark a historic turning point and boost upcoming IPO
summary: Google is reportedly in talks with SpaceX to launch its orbital data centers, a key component of its Project Suncatcher initiative. This partnership could mark a historic turning point in space-based infrastructure. It may also boost Google's upcoming IPO.
insight: Space-based data centers could revolutionize global cloud computing infrastructure.

title: SSD prices skyrocket by 300% in Japan, bringing 8TB Samsung 9100 drive to an eye-watering $3,500 industry continues to reckon with the ongoing AI storage crunch
summary: Samsung SSD prices surged 300% in Japan, reaching $3,500 for 8TB drives. This massive price hike is attributed to supply chain disruptions and high demand for AI storage. The AI storage crunch is driving up costs across the industry.
insight: Rising SSD prices exacerbate AI storage crunch and industry supply chain pressure.

title: EU considers running undersea cable under the North Pole to link Europe to Asia Polar Connect aims to bypass the Strait of Hormuz and Russia by 2030
summary: The EU plans to build an undersea cable under the North Pole to connect Europe to Asia, bypassing sensitive areas like the Strait of Hormuz and Russia. The project, called Polar Connect, aims to be operational by 2030. This route will pass through the harsh Arctic environment.
insight: Boosting EU-Asia connectivity and reducing reliance on geopolitically sensitive routes.

title: PortaRF single board SDR mixes HackRF One and PortaPack H4M hardware, adds AI voice control
summary: PortaRF is a compact, open-source software-defined radio integrating HackRF One and PortaPack H4M hardware with AI voice control, featuring improved signal quality and a wider frequency range.
insight: Revolutionizing portable SDR with AI-powered voice control and enhanced performance.

title: Clawdmeter A DIY ESP32-S3 desk dashboard for Claude Code token usage monitoring
summary: Clawdmeter is a DIY ESP32-S3 desk dashboard that displays Claude Code token usage in real-time, utilizing a 2.16-inch AMOLED screen and leveraging LVGL, NimBLE, and HID keyboard functionality.
insight: Real-time token usage monitoring for optimized code efficiency.

title: DEEPX DX-AIPlayer N97 mini PC combines Intel N97 SoC and 25 TOPS DX-M1 AI accelerator
summary: The DEEPX DX-AIPlayer N97 mini PC combines Intel N97 SoC with a 25 TOPS DX-M1 AI accelerator for real-time vision AI applications.
insight: Edge AI performance enhanced with dedicated, low-power AI acceleration.

title: Best of Sensors: InPlay's NanoBeacon targets temperature sensing
summary: InPlay's NanoBeacon wins Best of Sensors 2026 for temperature sensing innovation.
insight: Advancements in SoC technology address temperature sensing accuracy limitations.

title: Nvidia adds the RTX 5060 Ti to its 007 First Light game bundle
summary: Nvidia has added the RTX 5060 Ti to its 007 First Light game bundle, offering a high-performance graphics option for PC gamers. This bundle includes a highly anticipated title, charting James Bond's early days. The bundle is a promotion for Nvidia's latest graphics cards.
insight: Enhanced gaming experience for PC gamers with high-end graphics

title: Nearly 50,000 Lake Tahoe residents have one year to find new power as their utility pivots to data centers
summary: A Nevada energy company will stop supplying electricity to 49,000 Lake Tahoe residents in May 2027, leaving them to find alternative power sources. This change is not directly tied to a specific data center but follows Nevada's growing data center industry. The affected utility provider is based in California.
insight: Rapid growth of data centers threatens local power reliability

title: Android Auto's biggest update in years delivers edge-to-edge Maps, Gemini, and HD video streaming
summary: Android Auto receives its biggest update in years, featuring a Material 3 redesign and enhanced safety features.
insight: Improved user experience enhances driving safety and convenience.

title: The EU is going after TikTok and Meta over addictive algorithms and child safety failures
summary: The European Commission is taking action against TikTok and Meta over addictive algorithms and child safety failures.
insight: EU targets algorithm-driven addiction and child safety concerns in tech giants.

title: NAND contract prices surge over 600% since September 2025, DRAM up ~400%
summary: NAND contract prices surge over 600% since September 2025, DRAM up ~400%, due to high demand from AI startups.
insight: High demand for memory by AI startups drives inflationary market.

title: ForkLift 4.6.2 refines one of macOS' favorite SFTP file managers
summary: ForkLift 4.6.2 refines its SFTP file management capabilities on macOS with improved Finder integration, enhanced checksum tool, and bug fixes.
insight: Streamlined file management for macOS users enhances productivity.

title: Google Nest Wifi Pro three-pack hits new $229 record low
summary: The Google Nest Wifi Pro three-pack is now available for $229, down from its usual $299 price, and offers a mesh Wi-Fi system with Wi-Fi 6E capabilities and support for modern smart home devices.
insight: Affordable upgrade to high-speed Wi-Fi and smart home connectivity

title: The humble desktop monitor is quietly having its best years, and gamers are fully responsible
summary: Desktop monitor sales rebounded in 2025, growing 4.3% year over year. Manufacturers shipped 133.4 million units, driven by evolving high-end devices. The market is adapting to a laptop-dominated world.
insight: Gamers drive demand for enhanced desktop monitors and high-end visuals.

title: Googlebooks will feature Intel, Qualcomm, and MediaTek chips, and follow Google's strict hardware guidelines
summary: Google's Googlebook premium brand will enforce strict hardware guidelines for OEMs.
insight: Consistent user experience across devices drives premium market success.

title: Unitree reveals $650,000 production-ready mecha that punches through walls and crawls like a spider
summary: Unitree Robotics unveiled a production-ready mecha robot, the GD01, in a video. The GD01 is capable of punching through walls and crawling like a spider. This robot is priced at $650,000.
insight: Advancements in robotics could lead to new industrial and search applications.

title: Windows is getting a cloud feature that fixes bad drivers before they wreck your PC
summary: Microsoft is introducing a cloud-based recovery process for problematic drivers that will automatically replace outdated or bad drivers with the next available version.
insight: Preventive driver updates to avoid PC damage

title: Subnautica 2 playable build leaks online days before early access launch
summary: Subnautica 2 gameplay and screenshots leaked online before early access launch.
insight: Early access game security compromised by unknown individual's actions.

title: Google "Gemini Intelligence" shows off agentic Android 17 features that Apple has yet to deliver with Siri
summary: Google's Gemini Intelligence will roll out new automation features to devices this summer, starting with Pixel and Galaxy phones, and expanding to other devices later this year.
insight: Google's Gemini Intelligence surpasses Apple's Siri with agentic Android features.

title: Sony Reon Pocket Pro Plus brings the personal cooling device to the US
summary: Sony's Reon Pocket Pro Plus, a personal cooling device, has arrived in the US market. Originally developed in 2017 and crowdfunded in 2019, it has now expanded globally. This portable device offers a novel solution for temperature control.
insight: Revolutionizing personal temperature control with wearable tech innovation

title: UCF graduates boo commencement speaker for calling AI "the next industrial revolution"
summary: UCF graduates booed their commencement speaker over AI remarks.
insight: Graduates react strongly to AI being compared to industrial revolution.
